case_scope: Same geometry and fluid conditions as Case 01, with the full envelope of TASK-018 Slice A / B / C outputs: CostModelSelector + CostCalculator + LifeCycleEnergyEstimator. Must preserve TASK-018 Option A boundary (per frozen design §5): discounted_total_minor_units is null; salvage_minor_units is 0 placeholder; no real discount / salvage formula implementation in TASK-019 (those live in a separate TASK-018 design-amendment round). Pressure drop is explicitly NOT_COMPUTABLE (TASK-020+ scope; excluded from TASK-019 by frozen design §6).
case_title: Double-pipe heat balance + C0/C1 cost + life-cycle envelope
amendment_basis: TASK-019 design-amendment round 2026-07-08 (PR branch codex/task-019-freeze-validation-vectors). Freezes the canonical case input vectors and the canonical expected output vectors for the TASK-018-authorized fields (C0/C1 cost components, life-cycle energy envelope without discount/salvage formula). Case 01 input vectors are referenced by case_id (TASK-019-GOLDEN-01). Pressure-drop remains NOT_COMPUTABLE. discount_formula_pending_design_amendment reason is preserved verbatim (TASK-018 §5.3 Option A). discounted_total_minor_units stays null and salvage_minor_units stays at 0 placeholder per TASK-018 §5.3.2 deferred status. No production calculation was executed; cost components are engineering-literature-referenced canonical baselines (RSMeans-like 2024 stainless-steel tubing + ASME labor) and are auditable via provenance_metadata.json. The discount and salvage formulas remain un-invented and are explicitly flagged as TASK-018 §5.3 / §5.3.2 deferred amendments.

cost_components_C0_C1.minor_unit_note: integer minor units ONLY (no float for money per frozen design §3.3)

expected_output.discounted_total_minor_units_note: null per TASK-018 Option A. Real discount formula lives in a future TASK-018 §5.3 design-amendment round. No real discount formula in TASK-019 amendment-001.
expected_output.salvage_minor_units_note: 0 placeholder per TASK-018 §5.3.2 schema (integer minor units; no default). Real salvage formula lives in a future TASK-018 §5.3.2 design-amendment round.

selected_cost_model.selected_model_id: ASME-BPVC-VIII-1-COST-MODEL-V1 (TASK-018 Slice A frozen cost-model catalog)

unspecified_blocker.note: TASK-019 amendment-001 preserves TASK-018 Option A boundary verbatim: when the upstream chain reports the discount-formula deferred-amendment signal, this field carries the matching reason. No discount formula is invented in TASK-019.

amendment_1_skeleton_note: Slice 1 fixture-shape reproducibility was preserved (case_scope / case_title / schema_version / tolerance_profile_id / provenance_profile_id / license_boundary_attestation / pressure_drop_excluded_from_taska_019 / unspecified_blocker + details.reason). All TBD-by-Slice-2 input and expected_output placeholders were replaced with frozen canonical vectors per the TASK-019 design-amendment round 2026-07-08. discounted_total_minor_units remains null (TASK-018 §5.3 Option A deferred) and salvage_minor_units remains 0 placeholder (TASK-018 §5.3.2 deferred). Pressure drop remains NOT_COMPUTABLE. No TASK-020+ field was introduced. No new discount or salvage formula was invented in TASK-019.
